title: Citrus Bun Delight
description: A citrusy, dense, indulgent Jamaican dish featuring buns that are jain-friendly.
instructions: Generously grease a baking dish or tray with olive oil.
Cut the bread buns into halves and arrange them in the prepared pan, ensuring they are touching each other but not overlapping too much.
Combine almond milk, jaggery, water, and fresh citrus zest (if using) in a small saucepan. Stir until sugar is fully dissolved.
Pour the mixture over the arranged buns evenly, making sure all halves are moistened. Place the baking dish or tray in an oven-safe pot filled with 1-2 inches of hot water for indirect heat.
Bake for about 30 minutes until golden brown and tender. Keep a close eye to prevent burning due to the moisture from the water.
Sprinkle ground fennel seeds over the buns before serving or right after removing them from the oven.
